chunks.text: CS Visiting Faculty | EECS at UC Berkeley CS Visiting Faculty Sampath Kannan Visiting Professor sampathkannan@berkeley.edu Education: 1989, PhD, Computer Science, UC Berkeley; 1984, MS, Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, Princeton; 1982, BS, Tech in Electrical Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay Joseph "JM" Landsberg Visiting Professor Allen Yang Visiting Lecturer yang@eecs.berkeley.edu This campus directory is the property of the University of California, Berkeley.
